mapper.update:
UPDATE activity_application a JOIN photography_activity pa ON a.activity_id = pa.id
a.status = #{status},
pa.current_participants = CASE WHEN #{status} = 1 THEN pa.current_participants + 1 ELSE pa.current_participants END
WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT a.id, a.activity_id AS activityId, a.user_id AS userId, a.status, a.apply_time AS createTime,
u.username, rf.file_url AS avatar, p.title AS activityTitle
FROM activity_application a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN resource_file rf ON rf.biz_id = u.id AND rf.biz_type = 'AVATAR' LEFT JOIN photography_activity p ON a.activity_id = p.id
WHERE a.activity_id = #{activityId} AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY a.apply_time DESC

SELECT a.id, a.activity_id, a.user_id, a.status, a.create_time, u.username, u.avatar, p.title AS activityTitle FROM activity_application a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN photography_activity p ON a.activity_id = p.id WHERE a.activity_id = #{activityId} ORDER BY a.create_time DESC
